name: Roasted Pepper & Tomato Risotto
recipeIngredient: 2 red bell peppers (roasted, peeled, seeded, and pureed)
14 1/2 ounces premium diced tomatoes in puree
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan different from the risotto pan, sauté the onion and garlic over medium heat in half the olive oil until softened and translucent (3-5 minutes).
2. Add the pureed peppers, crushed red pepper flakes, crushed tomato puree, and remaining olive oil to the pan. Heat to a simmer.
3. Stir in the lemon juice and allow it to cool slightly.
4. In a large skillet, heat the remaining olive oil over medium heat. Cook the rice until golden on the edges.
5. Gradually add enough simmering stock to cover the rice, stirring frequently, until all moisture is absorbed (simmer until just cooked).
6. Repeat adding stock and cooking until only 3/4 cup of stock remains.
7. Stir in the tomato mixture, herbs, wine, remaining stock, cream, and Parmesan cheese. Cover and remove from heat for an additional 8 minutes.
